requirement: Full compliance with King IV Report on Corporate Governance for South Africa
notes: King IV compliance improving. Board effectiveness assessment completed. Audit committee independence strengthened. Irregular expenditure disclosure and consequence management remain areas of concern.

requirement: Compliance with all NERSA generation, transmission and distribution licence conditions
notes: EAF below licence target of 70%. Quality of supply standards partially met. NERSA monitoring Eskom's Generation Recovery Plan implementation quarterly.

requirement: Full compliance with Public Finance Management Act requirements for SOEs
notes: Prior year irregular expenditure of ZAR 2.8 billion being investigated. Consequence management actions underway. Supply chain management reforms implemented.

requirement: Full compliance with SACAA Air Operator Certificate conditions
notes: SAA Air Operator Certificate in good standing. Safety management system compliant. SACAA annual audit passed with no major findings.

requirement: Full compliance with National Conventional Arms Control Committee export licence requirements
notes: All export licences current and valid. NCACC compliance officer appointed. Annual export compliance audit passed.

companyName: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
requirement: Full compliance with PFMA and National Treasury Regulations
notes: SANRAL achieved clean audit for FY2024. No irregular, fruitless or wasteful expenditure. Supply chain management fully compliant.

companyName: Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA)

notes: Prior year disclaimer of opinion. Significant irregular expenditure. Financial management improvement plan under implementation. New CFO appointed November 2024.
